use_cases: Displaying site-wide announcements and promotional messages at the top of the viewport
Showing cookie consent or privacy policy notices that persist while scrolling
Notifying users about new features, updates, or maintenance windows
Highlighting limited-time offers or sales in e-commerce storefronts
Providing navigation context like current campaign or event information
ai_summary: A sticky banner component that anchors to the top of the viewport with scroll-triggered hide/show behavior using Framer Motion for smooth vertical transitions and opacity animations. Features a dismissible close button and configurable via props for className customization and hide-on-scroll functionality.
